integration.composedRender: renderMermaidToSvg -> normalizeSvg (reuse, no new render code)
integration.languageSwitch: c-i18n component kept functional via onLang registration

examples.renderMode: each example rendered via renderToSvg (real Mermaid, not static)
examples.clickToLoad: selectExample(src) loads source into editor and re-renders

empty.behavior: clears preview, shows EMPTY_HINT, no error class

parseError.behavior: clears preview, shows 'Parse error: <msg>' with .error class

renderError.behavior: clears preview, shows 'Render error: <msg>' with .error class

timeout.behavior: clears preview, shows 'Render timed out' with .error class

normalizeError.behavior: clears preview, shows 'Output error: <msg>' with .error class

errorStates.recovery: switching to valid input clears error state and renders SVG

evidence.designTokens: :root CSS custom properties in demo/style.styl (--accent-color, --text-color, --card-bg, etc.)
evidence.cardBase: .card class shared across usage-card, benchmark-card, editor-card
evidence.waterfallGrid: layoutWaterfall() function with ResizeObserver + absolute positioning

mathLeftoversAbsent.note: upstream i18n files (demo/i18n/*.js) still contain Math keys; deferred to I18N Loop

build.warning: chunk-size warning (>500kB); expected and tracked by Size Loop

deferred.theme: Theme Loop (Beautiful Mermaid CSS theme switching)
deferred.sizeComparison: Size Loop (size/gzip SVG bar chart wired to real data; benchmark shell placeholder kept)
deferred.i18n: I18N Loop (new Mermaid copy uses hardcoded English marked with TODO(i18n-loop); keys to be propagated to all 75 locales; upstream i18n Math keys retained pending I18N Loop cleanup)
